title: Update .gitignore for Varlink code and gopathok
body: Make sure we don't check generated files into the repo by adding them to the gitignore

comments.body: you shouldnt be updating API.md but rather the .varlink file; else the next make will nuke your changes.
@baude Didn't notice that slipped in, this should just be .gitignore changes. Let me fix that.
@baude Also, I only ran `make` - so part of me suspects that API.md and the .varlink might be out of sync in the repo?
@mheon would you mind seeing if they are out of sync and if so, then go ahead and commit API.md? I didn't think of that case when making my earlier comment.
